change_summary: clarified the system and subsystem requirement template guidance so repo-managed references keep full internal traceability while front-facing Excel reference cells only expose client or SharePoint sources, or `TBD` when no external source exists

tightened the requirement template contract so verification-specific fields stay TBD until verification work begins, legacy compliance field names were renamed, and references plus follow-up notes are now dated append-only lists
clarified governance and COTS pathing guidance in the template so folder expectations and external evidence locations match the current workspace logic
updated template COTS guidance to use component-area subfolders with one canonical JSON per area and SharePoint-hosted source captures
